feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Retrieve all sales prices for a customer using Sales Price - Retrieve (A2X)
entry.content:
I would like to extract all sales prices that are associated with a specific customer.  I have used API - Sales Price - Retrieve (A2X) but this only allows the identification of price for one product at a time.

Does anyone know of a way to extract all sales pricing for a single sold-to party?

entry.title: can SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition be set to be Single Sign On
entry.content:
hi,

The system is SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition , can it be set to be Single Sign On?

I want to Upload attachments to cloud storage from SAP , I want to be Single Sign On.

entry.title: Planning Table for 2 or more workcenters (repetitive manufacturing
entry.content:
Hi 

SAP S/4HANA Public cloud.

I have a customer who can produce the sale product on 2 or 3 production lines.

I would like to use Repetitive manufacturing, but I don't know how to show all 3 lines onthe Planning Board.

I have created different routings and versions.

Teoreticaly it shoud be easy to manupulate with line load per assignning different lines.

Is the any possibility to do so?

There is no WC Hierarchy in Public cloud.

Rgds

MAciej

entry.title: Multi-serials quality notifications
entry.content:
Hello the community,

We have the need to manage muti-serial numbers into the quality notifications (because we have serialized production orders with quantity > 1) and to be able to indicate a decision in front of each of them (S/N 1 accepted, S/N 2 scrapped, S/N 3 rework...)

But It seems not possible in S/4HANA Public Cloud version to manage more than one serial in a quality notification.

I have seen the possibility to implement business functions (OPS_QM_NOTIFICATION and OPS_QM_EXTENSIONS) in ECC6 version but what about S/4HANA Public Cloud version ?

Is there other way to manage it ?

Best Regards,

Gilles

entry.title: how to find SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition DB size
entry.content:
Hi, 

Is there a method to find out the DB size of S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition?

entry.title: Our S/4 HANA DB Size
entry.content:
Hi 

Is there a way to find out S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition DB size (current utilization)?

entry.title: ps
entry.content:
想請問Publice cloud是否可以直接銷售出貨專案庫存(601+Q)

 

情境為採購入庫時，存貨入到專案庫存(Q)，直接銷售此專案庫存(Q)

 

步驟:

  1. 採購單(有維護專案號碼)入庫時，存貨入到專案庫存(Q)
  2. 開立銷售訂單SO&出貨單DN，銷售訂單上有維護專案號碼(WBS)，開立出貨單，出貨單也有專案號碼(WBS)，但是發貨過帳時，系統只允許出未限制庫存(601)
  3. IMG的ITEM CATEGORY在PUBLIC CLOUD無法調整，所以也無法調整Special stock-Q

4.查看Scope:6GD - Engineer Products and Systems - Project with Production

但此scope 銷售訂單出貨是出貨未限制庫存(601)，非銷售專案庫存。

 

出貨單，如下，有維護專案號碼(WBS)，但是代碼為601，而不是601+Q

目前此料有庫存於專案庫存(Q)

ITEM CATEGORY

entry.title: Component Customisation - EAMS_WDA_ORDNTF_OIF error
entry.content:
Hi

Looking for some help with this please. I am trying to customise Change Maintenance Order WDA app in S/4HANA Public Cloud, and when entering the customisation prior to even trying to do what I am intending there are multiple errors as per screen shot. Has anyone tried to customise this and had these issues, if so how did you resolve?

My intention is the hide the "Create Follow-on Order" from the Additional Functions dropdown, doing this as the restrictions around work order type do not stop a user from creating YA02 in any app, this is just to remove the ability from this app.


Thanks

Chris

entry.title: I want to get the registered billing data of Invoice Summary(JP Country-Specific Functions) by API.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, using the Japanese Country/Region-Specific Functions "Invoice Summary processing/Report" (F1774)
I want to get the registered billing data by API. (For linkage with external form output system)
I tried using the following API, but I couldn't get the data of Invoice Summary(Payer Invoices and so on), and I'm having trouble knowing which API to use.

・Billing Document(ODATA V4)
・Accounting Document-Read (ODATA V2)

Could you tell me which API can get the data created by using the Invoice Summary function?

If there is no such API, please let me know if there is another way to extract data.

entry.title: Need help adding Live Connection from SAC to S/4Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Cannot add Live connection from S/4Hana Public Cloud
Both SAC and S/4Hana use the same identity provider (IAS)
Already created communication user (which is "SAC_LIVE_USER" in the screenshot)

All configurations follow this instruction

I tried to find a way to configure the InA role in S/4Hana but not found it yet.

Thanks,
Pakorn

entry.title: No application matching payment and invoice was found；How to confirm and claim payment and customer
entry.content:
#SAP S/4HANA CLOUD 公共版财务版#SAP S/4HANA CLOUD 公共版，1.未找到与付款和发票匹配的应用程序；

2.如何在系统中确认和领取付款和客户发票

entry.title: Error during Down payment request creation with reference to work order
entry.content:
Hello!

We are using our own chart of accounts, we do not use any standard G/L accounts.

During creation of down payment request with reference to PO (which has work order assignment) get the error that G/L account 65001000 doesn't exist in the chart of Accounts. I can not understand where this GL account comes from – this is the expense account (doesn't make sense to have expense GL account in down payment request). This G/L account is not assigned to any account determination config or any other config I’m aware of. Please help what i'm missing, i'm lost

entry.title: SUPPLIER INVOICE
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

I would like to know how to find out who posted invoice the invoice their names when we search in supplier invoice list .

however, we can be able to see names in completed or parked invoices in who's inbox it is present.

could give any solution how to findout who posted invoice ...?

entry.title: Add digital signature in Purchase order form in sap public cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Does anyone know how to add a digital signature to the Purchase Order form in SAP Public Cloud for India? I searched online but couldn't find any solution. Please let me know if it's feasible in SAP Public Cloud, and if so, how to do it. 

Regards,
Ranjan Panda 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement 

Support Services SAP Community #digitalsignature

entry.title: What is the alternative to app: Maintain Sample-drawing procedure in SAP public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi,

At the moment, the Maintain Sample-drawing procedure app is not available in SAP Public Cloud. What is the alternative to make de calculation of sample-drawing?  

Thank you. 

Ana

entry.title: Importing Electronic Bank Statements automatically in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
How to automatically import electronic bank statements to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition environment?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Maintenance order printing getting time out
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are printing the maintenance order from edit mode and from additional functions to print.

If the number of operations in the maintenance order is more (say 75 in our case) if we use the print queue and sent an output, it is throwing an error "500 internal server error".

So, instead of using the print queue we click on print preview so that the pdf will display and then printing it manually, but while doing it loading of PDF is taking the more time.

Could you please let us know the resolution/reason for the inconsistency. 

Regards,

Yaswanth

 @Ravisha 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Asset Management

entry.title: batch upload data from excel file to custom CDS table
entry.content: Hello， We use SAP S/4HANA PUBLIC CLOUD 2408. We create a custom CDS table to store some address information. We hope that users can input these information in excel file, then upload these data to the CDS table. Could anyboay can give some advises? Thanks very much. Best Regards, John Huang

entry.title: Add additional recipients to the email notification when a Purchase Requisition is approved
entry.content:
In S4/HANA Public cloud, the email is sent by default to the requestor only. How can we add additional recipients for the email notification when the PR is approved? I can't seem to find any available BAdi for this requirement. 

Edit: The Notification tab no longer exists in the current version of the Manage Workflow app. It seems like this is where we can modify the recipients of the email notifications. Do we have a separate app now where we can modify this? Or is this function really gone now?

entry.title: Are there other processing statuses for the subcontracting cockpit other than Valid and Error?
entry.content:
Hi.

I am currently implementing the scope item “BMY”

 

Must be Valid when Create Delivery is executed in the subcontracting cockpit

But what I would like to know is the conditions under which the error occurs

 

 

 

 

 

I understand one thing.

My understanding is that if the Shipping Point is None, it is an ERROR.

 

One more thing, I was able to register for delivery even though the shipping date was Overdued

 

 

Are there any other conditions that would cause an error?

If there are no others, I would like a comment that there are none
